title: Al-Ma'mun's execution at Adana of 'All and Husayn, the two sons of Hisham
description: Al-Ma'mun's execution at Adana of 'All and Husayn, the two sons of Hisham. Recorded under the year 217 AH (832 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
